side_effects.description: Cluster headaches relapsed after 8 years of remission; temporally linked to Melanotan I use

protocol_notes: User had been cluster headache-free for 8 years prior to Melanotan I use. User attributes headaches to melanocortin receptor agonism affecting HPA axis and hypothalamic dysfunction. Previously managed cluster cycles with high-dose tryptamines and other interventions. Currently in Texas with limited access to cycle-busting treatments. Alcohol is a known trigger when in active cycle.
